A R G U E D AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WITH THE FOLLOWING EXCEPTION: CAUSE OF ACTION 5 -- OVERRULED; EXCEPT AS TO THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS, THE DEMURRER TO THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. TENTATIVE RULING -- CAUSE ACTION 2 -- SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. CAUSE OF ACTION 3 FOR CONVERSION IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling with the following exception:
Cause of Action 5 -- overruled; except as to the individual defendants, the demurrer to this cause of action is sustained with 10 days leave to amend.
